task_completion.description: Set the base currency of the new portfolio to USD
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Portfolio Performance new file wizard or general settings screen shows the base currency selected as 'USD'.

task_completion.description: Create a securities account named 'Retirement Account'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Securities Accounts view or creation dialog in Portfolio Performance displays an account exactly named 'Retirement Account'.

task_completion.description: Create a linked cash/deposit account named 'Retirement Account (USD)'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Deposit Accounts or Cash Accounts view/dialog in Portfolio Performance displays an account exactly named 'Retirement Account (USD)'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the portfolio is empty of securities and transactions
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'All Securities' and 'Transactions' views in the Portfolio Performance application are empty, showing no listed items.

A 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog shows the filename 'retirement_portfolio.xml' being saved into the '/home/ga/Documents/PortfolioData/' directory, or the application title bar shows 'retirement_portfolio.xml' and a file manager/terminal confirms its presence in the correct directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the Portfolio Performance GUI to create the portfolio
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction (clicking, typing) within the Portfolio Performance application windows and wizards.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands or text editors to manually write the XML file
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) are shown containing XML code or commands like 'echo' or 'cat' generating the portfolio file.

integrity.description: Agent used the application's native save functionality
integrity.visual_evidence: The Portfolio Performance native 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog is visible during the trajectory, rather than moving/renaming an externally downloaded file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires using the Portfolio Performance (v0.81.5) GUI. The base currency must be exactly 'USD'. The securities account must be named exactly 'Retirement Account'. The cash/deposit account must be named exactly 'Retirement Account (USD)'. The file must be saved as 'retirement_portfolio.xml' in the directory '/home/ga/Documents/PortfolioData/'. The portfolio must not contain any securities or transactions.
